allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; tags=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['tags']; [print\(t['name']\) for t in tags]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; tags=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['results']; [print\(t['name']\) for t in tags if 'full' in t['name']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; tags=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['results']; [print\(t['name']\) for t in tags if 'full' in t['name'] and 'faststart' not in t['name'] and 'arm' not in t['name'] and 'amd' not in t['name']]")
